branding.footerText: Google Cloud Authorized Certification Authority. Secured by Peer Audit Protocol.
Stellar Education & Training Group. Certified globally.
Secured credential system by course certificates

textElements.text: This credential acknowledges that the recipient has satisfied all official criteria.
has successfully completed the premium specialized program
has fulfilled all intensive curriculum modules for

programs.name: Certified Professional Cloud Architect training
programs.description: Advanced 12-week design boot camp on building secure, resilient Cloud Architectures.

programs.name: Gemini Developer Mastery Program
programs.description: Practical training on Agentic Systems, Tool Function-calling, and reasoning parameters using Gemini SDK.

programs.name: Advanced Full-Stack Engineering with Next.js & React 19
programs.description: Intensive React-centric program detailing Server Components, suspense-bound layouts, and custom hydration engines.
